name: cleaning-website
description: J & S Palvelut Oy - Micro Frontend Web Platform

scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix shell" "npm start --prefix mfe-home" "npm start --prefix mfe-services" "npm start --prefix mfe-booking" "npm start --prefix mfe-about" "npm start --prefix mfe-pricing" "npm start --prefix mfe-reviews" "npm start --prefix mfe-contact" "npm start --prefix mfe-admin" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.start:frontend: concurrently "npm start --prefix shell" "npm start --prefix mfe-home" "npm start --prefix mfe-services" "npm start --prefix mfe-booking" "npm start --prefix mfe-about" "npm start --prefix mfe-pricing" "npm start --prefix mfe-reviews" "npm start --prefix mfe-contact" "npm start --prefix mfe-admin"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm run build --prefix shell" "npm run build --prefix mfe-home" "npm run build --prefix mfe-services" "npm run build --prefix mfe-booking" "npm run build --prefix mfe-about" "npm run build --prefix mfe-pricing" "npm run build --prefix mfe-reviews" "npm run build --prefix mfe-contact" "npm run build --prefix mfe-admin"
